---
title: "Career Quest: Why Study Computer Science?"
subtitle: "Discover Career Opportunities, Flexibility, and Future Potential"
format:
  live-html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.quest-badge}
💼 CAREER QUEST | Difficulty: Beginner | Time: 3 minutes
:::

::: {.hero}
# 🎓 Why Study Computer Science at Allegheny?

Computer Science opens doors to virtually **every career field**. Let's explore the opportunities waiting for you!
:::

## 💰 The Numbers Don't Lie

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-success}
**📊 Career Outlook**

- 💵 **Median Salary:** $100,530 per year (US Bureau of Labor Statistics, 2024)
- 📈 **Job Growth:** 15% growth through 2032 (much faster than average)
- 🌍 **Remote Work:** Many CS jobs offer location flexibility
- 🚀 **Startup Potential:** Strong foundation for entrepreneurship
- 🎯 **Industry Demand:** Every company needs tech talent
:::

## 🎯 Paths at Allegheny: Choose Your Own Adventure!

You don't have to go "all in" right away. Allegheny offers flexible options:

<div class="quest-grid">

::: {.quest-card}
### 🎓 Computer Science Major
**Deep Dive into CS**

- Core programming & algorithms
- Software engineering
- Data structures & databases
- AI, machine learning, cybersecurity
- Senior project/capstone

**Perfect for:** Future software engineers, researchers, tech leaders
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### ⭐ Computer Science Minor
**CS Skills + Your Passion**

- Foundation in programming
- Problem-solving skills
- Data analysis basics
- Applied computing

**Perfect for:** Pairing CS with biology, business, art, psychology, etc.
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🧪 Just Take a Course!
**Explore & Discover**

- Try CMPSC 100 (Intro)
- No commitment needed
- See if you enjoy it
- Gain valuable skills

**Perfect for:** Anyone curious about CS
:::

</div>

## 🌈 CS Pairs with EVERYTHING!

Computer Science is unique—it enhances **any other field** you're interested in:

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-info}
**🔬 Biology + CS = Bioinformatics**  
Analyze DNA sequences, model diseases, discover new drugs

**🎨 Art + CS = Digital Media & Game Design**  
Create animations, design games, build interactive experiences

**📊 Business + CS = Data Analytics & Tech Management**  
Analyze markets, optimize operations, lead tech companies

**🎵 Music + CS = Audio Engineering & Music Technology**  
Synthesize sound, create effects, build music apps

**🧠 Psychology + CS = Human-Computer Interaction**  
Design user experiences, study digital behavior, improve accessibility

**🌍 Environmental Science + CS = Climate Modeling**  
Simulate climate systems, analyze environmental data, predict changes

**📝 Writing + CS = Technical Communication & UX**  
Write documentation, design interfaces, explain complex ideas

**🏥 Health + CS = Medical Informatics**  
Build health apps, analyze patient data, improve healthcare systems
:::

## 💼 What Jobs Can You Get?

CS graduates work in diverse roles across all industries:

### 💻 Traditional Tech Roles

- Software Engineer / Developer
- Web Developer
- Mobile App Developer
- Game Developer
- Systems Administrator
- Database Administrator

### 🤖 Emerging Tech Roles

- AI/Machine Learning Engineer
- Data Scientist
- Cybersecurity Analyst
- Cloud Engineer
- DevOps Engineer
- UX/UI Designer

### 🎯 Interdisciplinary Roles

- Bioinformatics Scientist
- Digital Artist / Animator
- Quantitative Analyst (Finance)
- Research Scientist
- Technical Writer
- Product Manager

### 🚀 Entrepreneurship

- Start your own tech company
- Build and sell apps
- Freelance developer
- Tech consultant

## 🏛️ Why Allegheny College?

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-success}
**🎓 Small Classes, Personal Attention**

- Work directly with professors, not teaching assistants
- Collaborative learning environment
- Close-knit CS community

**🔬 Hands-On Learning**

- Build real projects from day one
- Senior capstone project
- Research opportunities with faculty

**🌍 Liberal Arts + CS**

- Combine CS with humanities, sciences, arts
- Develop communication & critical thinking
- Become a well-rounded professional

**💼 Career Support**

- Internship connections
- Alumni network
- Career preparation workshops
- Job placement support

**🏢 Location Benefits**

- Close to Pittsburgh tech scene
- Near major tech companies
- Regional conference attendance
- Industry partnerships
:::

## 📈 Start Wherever You Are

**No experience needed!** Our students come from all backgrounds:

- ✅ Never coded before? Perfect!
- ✅ Some experience? Great!
- ✅ Not sure if CS is for you? Try a course!
- ✅ Want to major or minor? We support both!

::: {.tip-box}
**💡 Real Student Path Examples:**

**Priya:** Biology major + CS minor → Now doing genomics research at NIH  
**Marcus:** CS major + Art minor → Working at gaming company  
**Sophia:** Entered undecided → Discovered CS sophomore year → Software engineer at Google  
**Jordan:** CS major → Started AI healthcare startup  
:::

## 🎮 Ready to Try It?

The best way to know if CS is for you is to **try it**!

::: {.quest-complete}
### ✨ Career Quest Complete!

You've discovered the opportunities waiting in Computer Science. Ready to write your first program?

**Next Quest:** [Try It Yourself! →](00-try-it-yourself.qmd)
:::

---

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-info}
**📞 Want to Learn More?**

**Visit the CS Department:**

- Website: [cs.allegheny.edu](https://cs.allegheny.edu)
- Email: [cs@allegheny.edu](mailto:cs@allegheny.edu)
- Schedule a Campus Visit

**Questions?**

- Talk to CS professors at the fair
- Meet current CS students
- Tour our CS labs
- Sit in on a class
:::
